videos.headline: Miami (OH)'s failed punt turns into a pick-six
videos.description: Miami (OH) kicker Alec Bevelhimer fails to get a punt off and tries to throw it, but gets intercepted by Ball State's Brandon Berger, who returns it for a touchdown.
